description: The crate-level doc table (lib.rs lines 14-16) links to `Ed25519Signer`, `EcdsaP256Signer`, and `RsaPss2048Signer` using intra-doc syntax. These types are each gated behind a feature flag. Without `#[cfg_attr(docsrs, doc(cfg(feature = "...")))]" annotations and `[package.metadata.docs.rs] all-features = true` in Cargo.toml, docs.rs builds with default features (none here), producing three broken-link warnings per default-feature build. Confirmed: `cargo doc --no-deps -p secretx-signature` (no features) emits three `unresolved link` warnings. The pre-push checklist requires `-D warnings` on the docsrs path, making these build failures there as well. Fix: add `[package.metadata.docs.rs]` with `all-features = true` to secretx-signature/Cargo.toml. The `[]`secretx`` link bug (crate-secretsx-c6u3.8) must also be fixed first or this will remain a hard error under -D warnings.
title: Missing docs.rs all-features metadata breaks crate-level doc links
